summary: Completed testing of 27 UX improvements for Telegram bot. All 11 utility modules load without syntax errors. 36/36 tests passed. Transaction IDs (TXN-YYYYMMDD-XXXXX format) are properly integrated in 5 purchase flows. Progress tracker, error handler, session recovery, onboarding, smart recommendations, DNS checker, and improved balance messages are all correctly imported and used in _index.js.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 27 UX improvements verified via code analysis and unit tests. The 11 utility modules are: transaction-id.js, improved-messages.js, progress-tracker.js, error-handler.js, order-history.js, onboarding.js, smart-recommendations.js, dns-status-checker.js, session-recovery.js, timeout-constants.js, retry-logic.js. All are imported in _index.js except timeout-constants.js and retry-logic.js which are ready but not yet wired up. Transaction IDs appear in success messages for phone (wallet/bank), domain, VPS, and wallet top-up purchases. Progress tracker shows 5 steps for VPS and 5-6 steps for hosting. Error handler notifies admin for critical failures. Session recovery prompts on /start. Onboarding shows for new users. Smart recommendations appear after domain purchase.
